---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected

labels: bug

---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x]
- Browser (if UI bug): [e.g. Chrome 125]

## Logs / Screenshots
If applicable, paste error output or attach a screenshot.
